tasks.title: Review AI briefing & act on insights
All 5 subscribers are cold with an average of only 1.0 drips each — set up an automated drip sequence of at least 5 emails to start warming them up toward a sales conversation.
You have 35 blog posts but 0 Reddit comments yesterday — repurpose key insights from your top blog posts into Reddit comments on r/Forex or r/Daytrading to drive free targeted traffic.

Zero new subscribers were added yesterday despite 24 social posts this week — add a clear lead magnet CTA (e.g., a free ICT concepts checklist) to your highest-performing posts to convert followers into subscribers.
